meanings.definition: make shorter than originally intended; reduce or retrench in length or duration
examples: He shortened his trip due to illness

meanings.definition: reduce in scope while retaining essential elements

examples: shorten the rope by a few inches

meanings.definition: edit by omitting or modifying parts considered indelicate

examples: the shortened rope was easier to use
her shortened life was clearly the result of smoking

meanings.definition: shortened by or as if by means of parts that slide one within another or are crushed one into another
examples: a miracle that anyone survived in the telescoped cars
years that seemed telescoped like time in a dream
